title: Log-free estimate for the resonant paraproduct in the 3D Navier-Stokes equations
summary:
We consider the resonant paraproduct (high-high $\to$ low regime) in the
nonlinearity $(u\cdot\nabla)u$ for the three-dimensional Navier-Stokes
equations. For sufficiently smooth, divergence-free u, we establish the a
priori estimate without logarithmic loss $$\|R_N(u)\|{\dot H^{-1}} \lesssim
N^{-1}\,\|u\|{\dot H^{1/2}}\,\|u\|_{\dot H^{1}},$$ with a constant independent
of the dyadic frequency $N$. The proof combines phase-geometric integration by
parts along an adapted frame, wave-packet discretization at scale $N^{-1/2}$,
and an anisotropic Strichartz estimate on time windows of length $N^{-1/2}$. In
the wide angular region we apply bilinear decoupling on a rank-3 phase surface;
in the geometry at hand the minimal curvature yields a gain of order
$N^{-1/6+o(1)}$ (with $o(1)\to 0$ as $N\to\infty$), which suffices to remove
the logarithmic loss. The contribution from the narrow region is handled
separately by an energy argument in $\dot H^{-1}$ using null-form suppression
near the interaction diagonal. The resulting bound is scale-consistent and
requires no smallness assumptions, only the divergence-free condition on $u$.
The analysis is restricted to a single resonant component of the paraproduct;
potential extensions are discussed.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维Navier-Stokes方程中高频-高频→低频共振拟积分的无对数损失先验估计
AI.motivation: 研究三维Navier-Stokes方程非线性项(u·∇)u中的共振拟积分（高频-高频→低频机制），解决该问题中常见的对数损失问题，为Navier-Stokes方程的正则性理论提供更精确的估计工具。
AI.techniques: 结合相位几何沿适应框架的分部积分、尺度为N^{-1/2}的波包离散化、长度N^{-1/2}时间窗口上的各向异性Strichartz估计，在宽角度区域应用秩3相位曲面上的双线性解耦，在窄区域使用能量论证和零形式抑制。
AI.main_theorems: 对充分光滑、无散度的u，建立了无对数损失的先验估计：\|R_N(u)\|_{\dot H^{-1}} ≲ N^{-1} \|u\|_{\dot H^{1/2}} \|u\|_{\dot H^{1}}，其中常数与二进频率N无关。
AI.significance: 这是Navier-Stokes方程正则性理论的重要进展，消除了共振拟积分估计中的对数损失，提供了尺度一致且无需小性假设的估计，为研究Navier-Stokes方程的整体正则性问题提供了新的分析工具。

title: Regularity theory for mixed local-nonlocal problem involving general stable operators
summary:
In this paper, we study the regularity of solutions to a linear elliptic
equation involving a mixed local-nonlocal operator of the form $$Lu -
\operatorname{div}\big(a(x)\nabla u(x)\big)= f, \quad \text{in } \Omega \subset
\mathbb{R}^n,$$ where $L$ is a general stable L\'{e}vy type operator and
$a(\cdot)$ is a positive H\"{o}lder continuous weight. By establishing a
maximum principle and a Liouville-type result in the entire space, we are able
to derive the interior regularity and the regularity up to the boundary of the
solutions under suitable assumptions on $f(x)$ and $a(x)$ .

AI.tldr: 研究混合局部-非局部椭圆算子的解的正则性，建立了最大值原理和Liouville型结果
AI.motivation: 研究包含稳定Lévy型算子和Hölder连续权重的混合局部-非局部椭圆方程的解的正则性，这类算子结合了局部扩散和非局部跳跃过程
AI.techniques: 建立最大值原理和整个空间上的Liouville型结果，利用这些工具推导内部正则性和边界正则性
AI.main_theorems: 在适当假设下，证明了混合局部-非局部椭圆方程解的内部正则性和边界正则性
AI.significance: 扩展了混合局部-非局部算子的正则性理论，为研究这类算子控制的偏微分方程提供了理论基础，在概率论和物理建模中有应用

title: On a new region for the Lane-Emden conjecture in higher dimensions
summary:
We study the Lane-Emden conjecture, which asserts the non-existence of
non-trivial, non-negative solutions to the Lane-Emden system
  \[
  -\Delta u = v^p, \quad -\Delta v = u^q, \quad x \in \mathbb{R}^n\]
  in the subcritical regime. By employing an Obata-type integral inequality,
Picone's identity, and exploiting the scaling invariance of the system, we
prove that the conjecture holds for any dimension $n \geq 5$ and exponents
satisfying $p\geq 1,q\geq 1$, and
  \[
  \frac{1}{p+1} + \frac{1}{q+1} \geq 1 - \frac{2}{n} + \frac{4}{n^2}.
  \]

AI.tldr: 证明了在n≥5维空间中，满足特定指数条件的Lane-Emden系统在次临界区域不存在非平凡非负解
AI.motivation: 研究Lane-Emden猜想，该猜想断言在次临界区域中Lane-Emden系统不存在非平凡非负解。Lane-Emden系统是椭圆型偏微分方程组的重要模型，在数学物理和几何分析中有广泛应用。
AI.techniques: 使用Obata型积分不等式、Picone恒等式，并利用系统的尺度不变性。这些技术结合了几何分析和变分方法。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当n≥5且指数满足p≥1,q≥1以及1/(p+1)+1/(q+1)≥1-2/n+4/n²时，Lane-Emden系统在ℝⁿ中不存在非平凡非负解。
AI.significance: 为Lane-Emden猜想提供了新的证明，扩展了该猜想的适用范围，对椭圆型偏微分方程组理论和临界点理论有重要贡献。

title: Global weak solutions to nonlinear kinetic Fokker--Planck equations in bounded domains under physical initial data
summary:
We establish the global existence of weak solutions to a nonlinear kinetic
Fokker--Planck equation with degenerate diffusion, under either inflow or
partial absorption-reflection boundary conditions. The novelty of our approach
lies in constructing solutions under solely the physical assumptions on the
initial and boundary data, namely finite mass, kinetic energy, and entropy,
with no additional regularity imposed. To overcome the lack of uniform
ellipticity, we develop a new compactness principle based on weighted Fisher
information, which yields strong $L^1$ convergence of approximate solutions.
This framework provides a robust existence theory under only the physically
relevant conditions, and applies uniformly to both inflow and reflection
boundary settings.

AI.tldr: 建立了非线性退化扩散Fokker-Planck方程在流入或部分吸收-反射边界条件下的全局弱解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有退化扩散的非线性Fokker-Planck方程，这类方程在物理和生物系统中广泛出现，但缺乏均匀椭圆性使得解的存在性分析具有挑战性，特别是在物理相关的边界条件下。
AI.techniques: 基于加权Fisher信息的新紧性原理，克服了非均匀椭圆性困难，实现了近似解的强L^1收敛，不要求额外的正则性假设。
AI.main_theorems: 在仅满足物理假设（有限质量、动能和熵）的初始和边界数据下，证明了非线性退化扩散Fokker-Planck方程在流入或部分吸收-反射边界条件下的全局弱解存在性。
AI.significance: 提供了在纯物理条件下（无需额外正则性）的鲁棒存在性理论，统一处理了流入和反射边界条件，为相关物理和生物系统的数学建模提供了理论基础。

title: Bifurcations of viscous boundary layers in the half space
summary:
It is well-established that shear flows are linearly unstable provided the
viscosity is small enough, when the horizontal Fourier wave number lies in some
interval, between the so-called lower and upper marginally stable curves. In
this article, we prove that, under a natural spectral assumption, shear flows
undergo a Hopf bifurcation near their upper marginally stable curve. In
particular, close to this curve, there exists space periodic traveling waves
solutions of the full incompressible Navier-Stokes equations. For the
linearized operator, the occurrence of an essential spectrum containing the
entire negative real axis causes certain difficulties which are overcome.
Moreover, if this Hopf bifurcation is super-critical, these time and space
periodic solutions are linearly and nonlinearly asymptotically stable.

AI.tldr: 证明了剪切流在接近上临界稳定曲线时会发生Hopf分岔，产生Navier-Stokes方程的空间周期行波解
AI.motivation: 研究剪切流在低粘度下的线性不稳定性，特别关注上临界稳定曲线附近的行为，解决由负实轴连续谱带来的困难
AI.techniques: Hopf分岔理论、谱分析、Navier-Stokes方程稳定性分析、处理连续谱覆盖负实轴的困难
AI.main_theorems: 在自然谱假设下，剪切流在上临界稳定曲线附近经历Hopf分岔，存在Navier-Stokes方程的空间周期行波解；若分岔是超临界的，这些时空周期解在线性和非线性意义下都是渐近稳定的
AI.significance: 首次证明了剪切流在上临界稳定曲线附近的Hopf分岔现象，为Navier-Stokes方程周期解的存在性和稳定性提供了严格数学基础，对流体动力学稳定性理论有重要贡献

title: On some divergence-form singular elliptic equations with codimension-two boundary: $L^p$-estimates
summary:
We establish a global weighted $L^p$ estimate for the gradient of the
solution to a divergence-form elliptic equations, where the coefficients are in
a weighted VMO space and the equations have singularities on a co-dimension two
boundary.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有余维数二边界奇性的散度型椭圆方程解的梯度在加权VMO系数下的全局加权L^p估计
AI.motivation: 研究具有余维数二边界奇性的散度型椭圆方程，这类方程在几何和物理问题中常见，如锥形奇点或边缘奇点，需要建立相应的正则性理论
AI.techniques: 使用加权函数空间理论、VMO（有界平均振动）系数处理、奇性边界分析、全局估计方法，可能涉及加权Hardy不等式和奇性边界的局部化技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了具有加权VMO系数的散度型椭圆方程解的梯度在加权L^p空间中的全局估计，特别处理了余维数二边界上的奇性
AI.significance: 扩展了椭圆方程的正则性理论到具有几何奇性的情形，为处理锥形域、边缘奇点等几何问题提供了分析工具，在几何分析和数学物理中有重要应用

title: Accelerated and fast magnetic reconnection through enhanced resistive dissipation for MHD equations
summary:
We consider the phenomenon of magnetic reconnection, namely a change in the
topology of magnetic lines, for sufficiently regular solutions of the
three-dimensional periodic magnetohydrodynamic (MHD) equations. We provide
examples where magnetic reconnection occurs on time scales shorter than the
resistive one, due to enhanced dissipation emerging from advective effects.
This is the first analytical result where the advection term plays an active
role in the reconnection process. A key aspect of our approach is a new
estimate for enhanced diffusion of high Sobolev norms, which is of independent
interest beyond its application to the MHD equations.

AI.tldr: 首次证明在三维周期MHD方程中，平流项能在比电阻时间更短的尺度上主动驱动磁重联
AI.motivation: 研究三维磁流体动力学(MHD)方程中磁重联现象，即磁力线拓扑结构的变化。传统理解认为磁重联主要由电阻耗散驱动，但本文探索平流项在更短时间尺度上主动驱动重联的可能性。
AI.techniques: 使用高Sobolev范数的增强扩散估计，分析平流效应导致的增强耗散，这是超越MHD方程应用的独立新方法。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在三维周期MHD方程中，存在足够正则的解，其磁重联发生在比电阻时间更短的时间尺度上，平流项在重联过程中起主动作用。
AI.significance: 这是首个平流项在磁重联中起主动作用的解析结果，为理解快速磁重联提供了新视角，高Sobolev范数增强扩散估计具有独立的理论价值。

title: Functional calculus for Safarov pseudo-differential operators
summary:
Given a smooth, closed Riemannian manifold $(M,g)$ equipped with a linear
connection $\nabla$ (not necessarily metric), we develop the holomorphic
functional calculus for operators belonging to the global pseudo-differential
classes $\Psi_{\rho, \delta}^m\left(\Omega^\kappa, \nabla, \tau\right)$
introduced by Safarov. As a consequence of our main result, we establish a
Szeg\"o type-theorem, derive asymptotic expansion of the heat kernel trace, and
calculate some associated spectral $\zeta$-functions.

AI.tldr: 在非度量线性联络的黎曼流形上建立了Safarov伪微分算子类的全纯函数演算
AI.motivation: 研究具有线性联络（不一定是度量联络）的黎曼流形上的伪微分算子理论，扩展经典伪微分算子理论到更一般的几何框架
AI.techniques: 使用Safarov引入的全局伪微分算子类Ψ^m_{ρ,δ}(Ω^κ,∇,τ)，建立全纯函数演算理论，结合谱理论和渐近分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 建立了伪微分算子类的全纯函数演算，证明了Szegő型定理，推导了热核迹的渐近展开，计算了相关谱ζ函数
AI.significance: 将经典伪微分算子理论推广到非度量联络情形，为谱几何和量子场论中的算子理论提供新工具，具有理论意义和应用价值

title: On Morawetz estimates for the elastic wave equation
summary:
We establish Morawetz-type estimates for solutions to the elastic wave
equation with singular weights of the form $|x|^{-\alpha}$ or
$|(x,t)|^{-\alpha}$. In particular, we show that space-time weights
$|(x,t)|^{-\alpha}$ admit stronger singularities and require weaker regularity
assumptions on the initial data compared to purely spatial weights
$|x|^{-\alpha}$.

AI.tldr: 建立了弹性波方程解的Morawetz型估计，比较了时空权重和纯空间权重的奇异性和正则性要求
AI.motivation: 研究弹性波方程解的衰减性质，特别是带有奇异权重的Morawetz估计，比较不同权重形式对解的正则性要求
AI.techniques: Morawetz估计方法，奇异权重分析，弹性波方程的能量估计，时空权重与空间权重的比较分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了带有奇异权重|x|^{-α}和|(x,t)|^{-α}的弹性波方程的Morawetz型估计，发现时空权重允许更强的奇异性且对初值正则性要求更弱
AI.significance: 深化了对弹性波方程解衰减行为的理解，为处理奇异权重问题提供了新工具，对波传播理论和偏微分方程理论有重要贡献

title: Non-uniqueness in Mean Curvature Flow: Non-canonical solutions via the parabolic Allen--Cahn
summary:
When mean curvature flow evolves non-uniquely, the flow is said to fatten.
The work of Ilmanen shows that any weak MCF is supported inside the fattening,
and work of Hershkovits--White identified canonical weak flows supported on the
boundary of the fattening, known as the outermost flows. It is natural to ask,
when the flow fattens, are there weak mean curvature flows supported strictly
inside the fattening? Outside of some special cases (e.g. flow from cones),
this question was entirely open. We show these interior flows exist, providing
a general construction for non-outermost flows as limits of solutions to the
parabolic $\varepsilon$-Allen--Cahn. This gives the first examples of closed,
non-trivial, non-canonical, integral Brakke motions. As part of this
construction, we study the $\varepsilon$-Allen--Cahn flow from low regularity
initial data, and our results demonstrate the existence of integral Brakke
motions from fractal sets. This includes the existence portion of Hershkovits's
work on mean curvature flow from Reifenberg sets.

AI.tldr: 构造了平均曲率流在"增厚"区域内部的非最外层弱解，首次给出了闭的、非平凡的、非典范的积分Brakke运动例子。
AI.motivation: 平均曲率流在演化过程中可能出现非唯一性，这种现象称为"增厚"。Ilmanen的工作表明任何弱MCF都包含在增厚区域内，而Hershkovits-White的工作识别了增厚区域边界上的典范弱流（最外层流）。核心问题是：当流增厚时，是否存在严格在增厚区域内部的弱平均曲率流？除了一些特殊情况（如锥形流），这个问题完全开放。
AI.techniques: 通过抛物型ε-Allen-Cahn方程解的极限构造非最外层流；研究低正则性初始数据下的ε-Allen-Cahn流；利用积分Brakke运动理论；处理分形集上的平均曲率流。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了内部流的存在性，为增厚区域内的非最外层流提供了通用构造方法；首次给出了闭的、非平凡的、非典范的积分Brakke运动例子；证明了从分形集出发的积分Brakke运动的存在性，这包含了Hershkovits关于Reifenberg集上平均曲率流工作的存在性部分。
AI.significance: 解决了平均曲率流理论中长期存在的开放问题，揭示了增厚现象的内部结构；为弱解的非唯一性提供了新的理解；将平均曲率流理论扩展到低正则性初始数据，包括分形集；建立了ε-Allen-Cahn方程与平均曲率流之间更深刻的联系。

title: Relaxation of Non-Convex Integral Functionals in the Multidimensional Scalar Case
summary:
We study integral functionals defined on scalar Sobolev spaces of the form
$$E[f]:u\mapsto \int_\Omega f(x,u(x),\nabla u(x)) d x,$$
  with an emphasis on the non-convex case, and the difficulties it involves to
prevent the Lavrentiev phenomenon. We determine a formulation of the lower
semicontinuous envelope of $E[f]$ with respect to various topologies and with
fixed Lipschitz Dirichlet boundary conditions.

AI.tldr: 研究非凸积分泛函在Sobolev空间中的下半连续包络及其与Lavrentiev现象的关系
AI.motivation: 研究非凸积分泛函在Sobolev空间中的变分问题，特别是如何避免Lavrentiev现象（即最小化泛函在不同函数空间中的值不同），在固定Lipschitz Dirichlet边界条件下分析泛函的下半连续性
AI.techniques: 使用变分法、凸松弛理论、Sobolev空间理论，通过构造下半连续包络（松弛泛函）来研究非凸泛函的极小化问题
AI.main_theorems: 确定了积分泛函E[f]在不同拓扑下的下半连续包络的显式表达式，特别是在固定Lipschitz Dirichlet边界条件下，给出了避免Lavrentiev现象的充分条件
AI.significance: 为非凸变分问题的正则化提供了理论框架，有助于理解Lavrentiev现象的机制，对材料科学、图像处理等领域的非凸优化问题有重要应用价值

title: Stability of non-conservative cross diffusion model and approximation by stochastic particle systems
summary:
We study the stability of non-conservative deterministic cross diffusion
models and prove that they are approximated by stochastic population models
when the populations become locally large. In this model, the individuals of
two species move, reproduce and die with rates sensitive to the local densities
of the two species. Quantitative estimates are given and convergence is
obtained soon as the population per site and the number of sites go to
infinity. The proofs rely on the extension of stability estimates via duality
approach under a smallness condition and the development of large deviation
estimates for structured population models, which are of independent interest.
The proofs also involve martingale estimates in H^{-1} and improve the
approximation results in the conservative case as well.

AI.tldr: 证明了非保守确定性交叉扩散模型可由随机种群模型近似，当种群局部变大时，并给出了定量估计和收敛性结果。
AI.motivation: 研究非保守确定性交叉扩散模型的稳定性问题，探索当种群数量在局部区域变大时，随机种群模型如何近似确定性模型，建立随机与确定性模型之间的联系。
AI.techniques: 扩展了对偶方法下的稳定性估计（在小性条件下），发展了结构化种群模型的大偏差估计，使用了H^{-1}空间中的鞅估计方法。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当每个位点的种群数量和位点数量趋于无穷时，随机种群模型收敛到确定性交叉扩散模型，给出了定量估计，并改进了保守情况下的近似结果。
AI.significance: 建立了随机种群模型与确定性交叉扩散模型之间的严格数学联系，发展了适用于结构化种群模型的新分析工具，对生态学中的种群动力学建模有重要理论意义。

title: Derivation of the fourth-order DLSS equation with nonlinear mobility via chemical reactions
summary:
We provide a derivation of the fourth-order DLSS equation based on an
interpretation as a chemical reaction network. We consider the rate equation on
the discretized circle for a process in which pairs of particles occupying the
same site simultaneously jump to the two neighboring sites; the reverse process
involves pairs of particles at adjacent sites simultaneously jumping back to
the site located between them. Depending on the rates, in the
vanishing-mesh-size limit we obtain either the classical DLSS equation or a
variant with nonlinear mobility of power type. Via EDP convergence, we identify
the limiting gradient structure to be driven by entropy with respect to a
generalization of diffusive transport with nonlinear mobility. Interestingly,
the DLSS equation with power-type mobility shares qualitative similarities with
the fast diffusion and porous medium equation, since we find traveling wave
solutions with algebraic tails or compactly supported polynomials,
respectively.

AI.tldr: 从化学反应网络角度推导四阶DLSS方程，识别其梯度结构，并发现幂型迁移率DLSS方程具有类似快扩散和渗流方程的定性特征
AI.motivation: 研究四阶DLSS方程的微观起源，通过化学反应网络解释其推导过程，探索离散化圆环上粒子对跳跃过程的连续极限
AI.techniques: 化学反应网络建模、EDP收敛方法、梯度结构识别、行波解分析、非线性迁移率处理
AI.main_theorems: 从离散粒子对跳跃过程推导出经典DLSS方程及其幂型迁移率变体；通过EDP收敛识别驱动熵的梯度结构；发现幂型迁移率DLSS方程具有代数尾部或紧支多项式的行波解
AI.significance: 为四阶DLSS方程提供了微观物理解释，建立了与化学反应网络的联系；揭示了DLSS方程与快扩散方程、渗流方程的定性相似性；发展了非线性迁移率偏微分方程的梯度结构理论

categories:
Systems of elliptic operators, unbounded coefficients, generation
  results, consistent strongly continuous analytic semigroups, kernel estimates
title: L^p-quasicontractiveness and Kernel estimates for semigroups generated by systems of elliptic operators
summary:
This paper focuses on systems of strongly coupled elliptic operators whose
coefficients may be unbounded and are defined on a domain $\Omega \subseteq
\mathbb{R}^d$. It is shown that a quasi-contractive semigroup in $L^p$-spaces
can be associated with such operators for values of $p$ belonging to an
interval that contains $2$ as an interior point. Then, under refined
assumptions and considering systems of elliptic operators coupled up to first
order, new kernel estimates are established with respect to a distance function
that accounts for the growth of the diffusion coefficients and the potential
term at infinity.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了强耦合椭圆算子系统的拟压缩半群和核估计理论，适用于系数无界的情况。
AI.motivation: 研究定义在$\Omega \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$上的强耦合椭圆算子系统，其系数可能无界。这类算子出现在许多物理和数学问题中，但系数无界性带来了分析上的挑战，需要发展新的理论工具来处理这类系统的半群生成和核估计问题。
AI.techniques: 使用拟压缩半群理论、$L^p$空间分析、椭圆算子正则性理论；引入考虑扩散系数和势项在无穷远处增长的距离函数；建立核估计的精细分析方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了对于包含2作为内点的$p$值区间，可以在$L^p$空间中关联一个拟压缩半群；2. 在一阶耦合的椭圆算子系统下，建立了关于考虑系数增长的距离函数的新的核估计。
AI.significance: 为系数无界的强耦合椭圆系统提供了系统的半群理论框架，扩展了经典椭圆算子理论的应用范围；新的核估计结果为研究这类系统的正则性、长时间行为和概率表示提供了重要工具。
